architecture_fit.note: Single cross-attention head as a minimal delta from base_model: token-identity match + relative-position bias; best head lift 0.57, mass 0.63 on LCS keys.

baseline_comparison.note: Built-in ablation ladder (token+pos / token-only / pos-only / uniform); uniform head reproduces the random baseline exactly (lift 0.0).

faithfulness.note: Hand-built, openly stated; the per-head ablation ladder is the causal test (removing either term collapses lift), though there is no trained-model activation patching.

operating_range.note: Vocab swept 2->64 (~1.5 orders); monotone lift curve from 0.27 (dense) to 0.86 (sparse), honestly noting it falls short of 2 full orders.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entirely hand-set weights, no training — every coefficient is interpretable and motivated by the LCS structure.

visual_judgement.note: Three coupled views: ablation bar chart with baseline line, heatmap with red LCS-partner boxes, and log-x operating-range curve — claim is legible at a glance.

visualisation_rationale.note: 'Why this visualisation' ties each chart to the goal: strawman contrast, alignment verification on DP cells, and where-it-breaks coverage.

notes: A strong hand-built LCS-alignment head expressed as a tiny delta from base_model, with a built-in ablation ladder that doubles as causal evidence and a clear leaderboard headline (lcs_lift_canonical 0.57). Visualisations are excellent and well-justified. Minor gaps: operating range covers ~1.5 rather than 2 orders of magnitude, and faithfulness rests on the ablation ladder rather than trained-model patching (appropriate but not maximal).
